description_long: This is a small, single-engine, red airplane with a sleek, streamlined fuselage and a bubble canopy cockpit. The wings are straight and low-mounted, extending horizontally from the fuselage with white accent stripes for visual contrast. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear consists of two main wheels and a smaller nose wheel, all fixed and visible. The tail section features a conventional design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, also accented with white stripes. The cockpit is enclosed with a transparent canopy, and the overall design suggests a light sport or aerobatic aircraft, suitable for short flights or recreational use. The surface appears smooth and glossy, with metallic and glass elements visible.
description: A small, red, single-engine airplane with a bubble canopy, low-mounted straight wings, and fixed tricycle landing gear. Features white accent stripes and a conventional tail design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red fuselage, bubble canopy, propeller at the nose, and fixed landing gear beneath the wings.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, bubble canopy, straight wings, and the tricycle landing gear configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same features as view 0, with clear visibility of the tail and wing stripes.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail section, single vertical stabilizer, horizontal stabilizers, and the rear of the cockpit canopy.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight, untapered wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and one nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a bubble canopy and clear side windows.
